image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: The ocean is hiding living light — and science just explained why.
Context visual: A short educational video revealing how and why animals glow in the dark.
Retention Hook visual: And the next part is the one people replay.
Escalation visual: A short educational video revealing how and why animals glow in the dark.
Evidence visual: The data keeps pointing to the same conclusion — once you see it, you cannot unsee it.
Retention Hook visual: But here is the detail almost everyone skips.
Payoff visual: That is why secrets of bioluminescence revealed changes how you should think about this.
Cta visual: Follow for more nature secrets
